Home.title: Sheki Yaylasi
Home.subtitle: Luxury and peace nestled in the mountains of Kish village
Home.welcome_desc: Located on the slopes of Kish village in Sheki, one of Azerbaijan's most historic and beautiful regions, Sheki Yaylasi promises a premium stay and unforgettable scenic views. We blend the purity of fresh air, the singing of birds, and the absolute peace of the forest with luxury services.

Home.cta_subtitle: Easily book via phone call or WhatsApp

About.title: Our Story
About.subtitle: A peaceful mountain sanctuary waiting to be discovered
About.story_text: Sheki Yaylasi was established with the vision of elevating mountain tourism in Kish, one of the oldest settlements in Azerbaijan. Located near the ancient church of Kish, in close proximity to forests and rivers, our hotel is an ideal retreat for those seeking a getaway with a touch of luxury amidst natural surroundings.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Have a question or looking to book a room? We are always here to help you.
